ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar, Euro) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency against a base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type (e.g., Property, Plant, and Equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the asset is a current asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liability_types" (
  "liability_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each liability type */,
  "liability_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the liability type (e.g., Current Debt, Long-Term Debt) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the liability type */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the liability is a current liability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liability_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_types" (
  "equity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity type */,
  "equity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the equity type (e.g., Common Stock, Retained Earnings) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equity type */,
  "is_common_stock" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the equity type is common stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depreciation_amortization" (
  "dep_am_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depreciation/amortization entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of asset */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of depreciation or amortization */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of depreciation or amortization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the depreciation or amortization period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the depreciation or amortization period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dep_am_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depreciation_amortization_asset_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type_id") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_details" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "investment_type" TEXT /* Type of investment (e.g., Long-Term, Short-Term) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the investment */,
  "investment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "expected_return" REAL /* Expected return on the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "debt_details" (
  "debt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each debt */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "debt_type" TEXT /* Type of debt (e.g., Current Debt, Long-Term Debt) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the debt */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate on the debt */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the debt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("debt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receivable_details" (
  "receivable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receivable */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "receivable_type" TEXT /* Type of receivable (e.g., Current Receivables) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the receivable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the receivable */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receivable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_details" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "inventory_type" TEXT /* Type of inventory (e.g., Finished Goods, Raw Materials) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of inventory */,
  "inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Financial Analyst, Auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
